diff --git a/src/RazorSdk/Targets/Sdk.Razor.CurrentVersion.targets b/src/RazorSdk/Targets/Sdk.Razor.CurrentVersion.targets
index 919d24fa54..fb31a311fc 100644
--- a/src/RazorSdk/Targets/Sdk.Razor.CurrentVersion.targets
+++ b/src/RazorSdk/Targets/Sdk.Razor.CurrentVersion.targets
@@ -151,6 +151,34 @@ Copyright (c) .NET Foundation. All rights reserved.
     <_IsTargetingRazor2X Condition="'$(IsRazorCompilerReferenced)'=='true'">true</_IsTargetingRazor2X>
   </PropertyGroup>
 
+  <!-- Embedded ValidatableTypeAttribute support (NET 10+) -->
+  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '10.0'))">
+    <!-- Detect if project contains .razor files -->
+    <_HasRazorFiles Condition="'$(_HasRazorFiles)' == ''">false</_HasRazorFiles>
+    <_HasRazorFiles Condition="'@(RazorComponent)' != '' OR '@(RazorPage)' != ''">true</_HasRazorFiles>
+
+    <!-- Control embedded attribute generation (defaults to true when .razor files present) -->
+    <GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute Condition="'$(GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute)' == '' AND '$(_HasRazorFiles)' == 'true'">true</GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute>
+    <GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute Condition="'$(GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute)' == ''">false</GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute>
+
+    <!-- Control global using generation (separate property for flexibility) -->
+    <IncludeEmbeddedValidationGlobalUsing Condition="'$(IncludeEmbeddedValidationGlobalUsing)' == '' AND '$(GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute)' == 'true'">true</IncludeEmbeddedValidationGlobalUsing>
+    <IncludeEmbeddedValidationGlobalUsing Condition="'$(IncludeEmbeddedValidationGlobalUsing)' == ''">false</IncludeEmbeddedValidationGlobalUsing>
+  </PropertyGroup>
+
+  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(GenerateEmbeddedValidatableTypeAttribute)' == 'true'">
+    <Compile Include="$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)EmbeddedAttribute.cs">
+      <Link>EmbeddedAttribute.cs</Link>
+    </Compile>
+    <Compile Include="$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)ValidatableTypeAttribute.cs">
+      <Link>ValidatableTypeAttribute.cs</Link>
+    </Compile>
+  </ItemGroup>
+
+  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(IncludeEmbeddedValidationGlobalUsing)' == 'true'">
+    <Using Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Validation.Embedded" />
+  </ItemGroup>
+
   <!--
     These are the targets that actually do compilation using CSC, separated from the main file for ease of maintenance.
 
diff --git a/test/Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Tests/BuildWithComponentsIntegrationTest.cs b/test/Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Tests/BuildWithComponentsIntegrationTest.cs
index 1feb0fed8a..8aa7ebe067 100644
--- a/test/Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Tests/BuildWithComponentsIntegrationTest.cs
+++ b/test/Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Tests/BuildWithComponentsIntegrationTest.cs
@@ -56,6 +56,9 @@ private void Build_ComponentsWorks([CallerMemberName] string callerName = "")
             new FileInfo(Path.Combine(outputPath, "MvcWithComponents.dll")).AssemblyShould().ContainType("MvcWithComponents.Components.Counter");
             // Views should also appear in the app assembly.
             new FileInfo(Path.Combine(outputPath, "MvcWithComponents.dll")).AssemblyShould().ContainType("AspNetCoreGeneratedDocument.Views_Home_Index");
+
+            // Regression test: the embedded ValidatableTypeAttribute should be emitted when .razor files are present.
+            new FileInfo(Path.Combine(outputPath, "MvcWithComponents.dll")).AssemblyShould().ContainType("Microsoft.Extensions.Validation.Embedded.ValidatableTypeAttribute");
         }
     }
 }
diff --git a/test/TestAssets/TestProjects/RazorMvcWithComponents/Test.cs b/test/TestAssets/TestProjects/RazorMvcWithComponents/Test.cs
index eaa1ddd367..671be32f85 100644
--- a/test/TestAssets/TestProjects/RazorMvcWithComponents/Test.cs
+++ b/test/TestAssets/TestProjects/RazorMvcWithComponents/Test.cs
@@ -1,5 +1,8 @@
+using Microsoft.Extensions.Validation.Embedded;
+
 namespace MvcWithComponents
 {
+    [ValidatableType]
     public class Test
     {
         public static string Foo { get; set; }

<!--
***********************************************************************************************
Sdk.Razor.CurrentVersion.props

WARNING:  DO NOT MODIFY this file unless you are knowledgeable about MSBuild and have
          created a backup copy.  Incorrect changes to this file will make it
          impossible to load or build your projects from the command-line or the IDE.

Copyright (c) .NET Foundation. All rights reserved.
***********************************************************************************************
-->
<Project ToolsVersion="14.0">
  <!--
    Properties and tasks supporting Razor MSBuild integration
  -->

  <!--
    Default properties for common Razor SDK behavior.
  -->
  <PropertyGroup>
    <UsingMicrosoftNETSdkRazor>true</UsingMicrosoftNETSdkRazor>

    <!--
    Set to true to automatically include certain file types, such as .cshtml files, as content in the project.
    When referenced via Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web, this additionally includes all files under wwwroot, and any config files.
    -->
    <EnableDefaultContentItems Condition="'$(EnableDefaultContentItems)'==''">true</EnableDefaultContentItems>

    <!--
      Set to true to automatically include Razor (.cshtml) files in @(RazorGenerate) from @(Content).
    -->
    <EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems Condition="'$(EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems)'==''">true</EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems>

    <!--
      Set to true to automatically include Razor (.razor) files in @(RazorComponent) from @(Content).
    -->
    <EnableDefaultRazorComponentItems Condition="'$(EnableDefaultRazorComponentItems)'==''">true</EnableDefaultRazorComponentItems>

    <!--
      Set to true to copy RazorGenerate items (.cshtml) to the publish directory.

      Typically Razor files are not needed for a published application if they participate in compilation at build-time
      or publish-time. By default, the Razor SDK will suppress the copying of RazorGenerate items to the publish directory.
    -->
    <CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory Condition="'$(CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory)'==''">false</CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory>

    <!--
    Determines the toolset to use to compile Razor (.cshtml) files. Defaults to 'Implicit' to let the Razor Sdk determine the toolset to use.
    Valid values include 'Implicit', 'RazorSdk', and 'PrecompilationTool'.
    -->
    <RazorCompileToolset>Implicit</RazorCompileToolset>

    <!--
    Configures whether all Razor content items (.cshtml files) will be marked to be included in the produced NuGet package as content.

    All Content items are included in a NuGet package as content files. This setting can be used to control this behavior for Razor content items.
    -->
    <IncludeRazorContentInPack Condition="'$(IncludeRazorContentInPack)'==''">false</IncludeRazorContentInPack>

    <!--
    Configures the file extension used for generated C# files.
    -->
    <RazorGenerateOutputFileExtension>.g.cs</RazorGenerateOutputFileExtension>

    <!--
    List of file extensions that will cause VS to restart the application when RazorSDK is effective.
    This property affects C# projects targeting 3.0 or later.
    -->
    <RazorUpToDateReloadFileTypes>.cs;.razor;.resx;.cshtml</RazorUpToDateReloadFileTypes>

    <!--
    Target used by dotnet-watch to resolve additional items.
    -->
    <CustomCollectWatchItems>$(CustomCollectWatchItems);_RazorSdkCustomCollectWatchItems</CustomCollectWatchItems>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(EnableDefaultItems)' == 'true' And '$(EnableDefaultContentItems)' == 'true'">
    <Content Include="**\*.cshtml" ExcludeFromSingleFile="true" CopyToPublishDirectory="PreserveNewest" Exclude="$(DefaultItemExcludes);$(DefaultExcludesInProjectFolder);$(DefaultWebContentItemExcludes)" />
    <Content Include="**\*.razor" ExcludeFromSingleFile="true" Exclude="$(DefaultItemExcludes);$(DefaultExcludesInProjectFolder);$(DefaultWebContentItemExcludes)" />
    <None Remove="**\*.cshtml" />
    <None Remove="**\*.razor" />
  </ItemGroup>

</Project>

1→﻿<!--
     2→***********************************************************************************************
     3→Sdk.Razor.CurrentVersion.targets
     4→
     5→WARNING:  DO NOT MODIFY this file unless you are knowledgeable about MSBuild and have
     6→          created a backup copy.  Incorrect changes to this file will make it
     7→          impossible to load or build your projects from the command-line or the IDE.
     8→
     9→Copyright (c) .NET Foundation. All rights reserved.
    10→***********************************************************************************************
    11→-->
    12→<Project ToolsVersion="14.0" TreatAsLocalProperty="_RazorSdkTasksTFM;_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion">
    13→
    14→  <PropertyGroup>
    15→    <EnableDefaultContentItems Condition=" '$(EnableDefaultContentItems)' == '' ">true</EnableDefaultContentItems>
    16→  </PropertyGroup>
    17→
    18→  <!--
    19→    Targets supporting Razor MSBuild integration. Contain support for generating C# code using Razor
    20→    and including the generated code in the project lifecycle, including compiling, publishing and producing
    21→    nuget packages.
    22→  -->
    23→
    24→  <!--
    25→    This is a hook to import a set of targets before the Razor targets. By default this is unused.
    26→  -->
    27→  <Import Project="$(CustomBeforeRazorSdkTargets)" Condition="'$(CustomBeforeRazorSdkTargets)' != '' and Exists('$(CustomBeforeRazorSdkTargets)')"/>
    28→
    29→  <PropertyGroup>
    30→    <!-- Paths to tools, tasks, and extensions are calculated relative to the RazorSdkDirectoryRoot. This can be modified to test a local build. -->
    31→    <RazorSdkDirectoryRoot Condition="'$(RazorSdkDirectoryRoot)'==''">$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)..\</RazorSdkDirectoryRoot>
    32→    <RazorSdkBuildTasksDirectoryRoot Condition="'$(RazorSdkBuildTasksDirectoryRoot)'==''">$(RazorSdkDirectoryRoot)tasks\</RazorSdkBuildTasksDirectoryRoot>
    33→    <_RazorSdkTasksTFM Condition=" '$(MSBuildRuntimeType)' == 'Core'">net10.0</_RazorSdkTasksTFM>
    34→    <_RazorSdkTasksTFM Condition=" '$(_RazorSdkTasksTFM)' == ''">net472</_RazorSdkTasksTFM>
    35→    <RazorSdkBuildTasksAssembly>$(RazorSdkBuildTasksDirectoryRoot)$(_RazorSdkTasksTFM)\Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Tasks.dll</RazorSdkBuildTasksAssembly>
    36→    <_RazorSdkToolAssembly>$(RazorSdkDirectoryRoot)tools\rzc.dll</_RazorSdkToolAssembly>
    37→  </PropertyGroup>
    38→
    39→  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(DOTNET_HOST_PATH)' == ''">
    40→    <_RazorSdkDotNetHostDirectory>$(NetCoreRoot)</_RazorSdkDotNetHostDirectory>
    41→    <_RazorSdkDotNetHostFileName>dotnet</_RazorSdkDotNetHostFileName>
    42→    <_RazorSdkDotNetHostFileName Condition="'$(OS)' == 'Windows_NT'">dotnet.exe</_RazorSdkDotNetHostFileName>
    43→  </PropertyGroup>
    44→
    45→  <!-- Resolve the TFM-specific attributes conditionally. -->
    46→  <Choose>
    47→    <When Condition=" '$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '10.0')) ">
    48→      <PropertyGroup>
    49→        <_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>true</_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>
    50→        <_TargetingNET50OrLater>true</_TargetingNET50OrLater>
    51→        <_TargetingNET60OrLater>true</_TargetingNET60OrLater>
    52→        <_TargetingNET70OrLater>true</_TargetingNET70OrLater>
    53→        <_TargetingNET80OrLater>true</_TargetingNET80OrLater>
    54→        <_TargetingNET90OrLater>true</_TargetingNET90OrLater>
    55→        <_TargetingNET100OrLater>true</_TargetingNET100OrLater>
    56→        <UseRazorSourceGenerator Condition="'$(Language)' == 'C#' AND '$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' == '' ">true</UseRazorSourceGenerator>
    57→        <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == '' ">9.0</RazorLangVersion>
    58→        <_RazorUseRoslynTokenizer Condition="'$(_RazorUseRoslynTokenizer)'==''">true</_RazorUseRoslynTokenizer>
    59→        <Features Condition="'$(_RazorUseRoslynTokenizer)'=='true'">use-roslyn-tokenizer=true;$(Features)</Features>
    60→      </PropertyGroup>
    61→    </When>
    62→    <When Condition=" '$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '9.0')) ">
    63→      <PropertyGroup>
    64→        <_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>true</_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>
    65→        <_TargetingNET50OrLater>true</_TargetingNET50OrLater>
    66→        <_TargetingNET60OrLater>true</_TargetingNET60OrLater>
    67→        <_TargetingNET70OrLater>true</_TargetingNET70OrLater>
    68→        <_TargetingNET80OrLater>true</_TargetingNET80OrLater>
    69→        <_TargetingNET90OrLater>true</_TargetingNET90OrLater>
    70→        <UseRazorSourceGenerator Condition="'$(Language)' == 'C#' AND '$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' == '' ">true</UseRazorSourceGenerator>
    71→        <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == '' ">9.0</RazorLangVersion>
    72→      </PropertyGroup>
    73→    </When>
    74→    <When Condition=" '$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '8.0')) ">
    75→      <PropertyGroup>
    76→        <_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>true</_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>
    77→        <_TargetingNET50OrLater>true</_TargetingNET50OrLater>
    78→        <_TargetingNET60OrLater>true</_TargetingNET60OrLater>
    79→        <_TargetingNET70OrLater>true</_TargetingNET70OrLater>
    80→        <_TargetingNET80OrLater>true</_TargetingNET80OrLater>
    81→        <UseRazorSourceGenerator Condition="'$(Language)' == 'C#' AND '$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' == '' ">true</UseRazorSourceGenerator>
    82→        <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == '' ">8.0</RazorLangVersion>
    83→      </PropertyGroup>
    84→    </When>
    85→    <When Condition=" '$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '7.0')) ">
    86→      <PropertyGroup>
    87→        <_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>true</_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>
    88→        <_TargetingNET50OrLater>true</_TargetingNET50OrLater>
    89→        <_TargetingNET60OrLater>true</_TargetingNET60OrLater>
    90→        <_TargetingNET70OrLater>true</_TargetingNET70OrLater>
    91→        <UseRazorSourceGenerator Condition="'$(Language)' == 'C#' AND '$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' == '' ">true</UseRazorSourceGenerator>
    92→        <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == '' ">7.0</RazorLangVersion>
    93→      </PropertyGroup>
    94→    </When>
    95→    <When Condition=" '$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '6.0')) ">
    96→      <PropertyGroup>
    97→        <_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>true</_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>
    98→        <_TargetingNET50OrLater>true</_TargetingNET50OrLater>
    99→        <_TargetingNET60OrLater>true</_TargetingNET60OrLater>
   100→        <UseRazorSourceGenerator Condition="'$(Language)' == 'C#' AND '$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' == '' ">true</UseRazorSourceGenerator>
   101→        <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == '' ">6.0</RazorLangVersion>
   102→      </PropertyGroup>
   103→    </When>
   104→    <When Condition=" '$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '5.0')) ">
   105→      <PropertyGroup>
   106→        <_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>true</_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>
   107→        <_TargetingNET50OrLater>true</_TargetingNET50OrLater>
   108→        <UseRazorSourceGenerator>false</UseRazorSourceGenerator>
   109→        <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == '' ">5.0</RazorLangVersion>
   110→      </PropertyGroup>
   111→    </When>
   112→    <When Condition=" '$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '3.0')) ">
   113→      <PropertyGroup>
   114→        <_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>true</_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater>
   115→        <UseRazorSourceGenerator>false</UseRazorSourceGenerator>
   116→        <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == '' ">3.0</RazorLangVersion>
   117→      </PropertyGroup>
   118→    </When>
   119→    <When Condition="'$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETStandard' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '2.1')) ">
   120→      <PropertyGroup>
   121→        <_TargetingNETStandard21OrLater>true</_TargetingNETStandard21OrLater>
   122→      </PropertyGroup>
   123→    </When>
   124→    <When Condition="'$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETStandard' AND $([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('$(TargetFrameworkVersion)', '2.0')) ">
   125→      <PropertyGroup>
   126→        <_TargetingNETStandard20OrLater>true</_TargetingNETStandard20OrLater>
   127→      </PropertyGroup>
   128→    </When>
   129→  </Choose>
   130→
   131→  <PropertyGroup>
   132→    <!--
   133→      In 3.0, we expect RazorLangVersion to either be specified in the template or inferred via TFM. In 2.x, RazorLangVersion is
   134→      specified via the Razor.Design package. We'll default to a version of 2.1, the earliest version that the SDK supports.
   135→      A 2.1 version should result in a build warning if the project contains Components.
   136→    -->
   137→    <RazorLangVersion Condition="'$(RazorLangVersion)' == ''">2.1</RazorLangVersion>
   138→
   139→    <!-- Keep this in sync with RazorLangVersion.cs if we introduce new text based values. -->
   140→    <_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion Condition="
   141→        '$(RazorLangVersion)' == 'Latest' OR
   142→        '$(RazorLangVersion)' == 'Experimental' OR
   143→        ('$(RazorLangVersion)' != '' AND '$(RazorLangVersion)' >= '3.0')">true</_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion>
   144→  </PropertyGroup>
   145→
   146→  <PropertyGroup>
   147→    <!--
   148→      The property IsRazorCompilerReferenced is defined by the 2.x Razor.Design package. We can use this as a best guess to determine if a project is targeting 2.x or earlier.
   149→      This is useful to provide 3.0 or newer specific build warnings. However, since it's not very reliable, we should not use this to make build-altering decisions.
   150→    -->
   151→    <_IsTargetingRazor2X Condition="'$(IsRazorCompilerReferenced)'=='true'">true</_IsTargetingRazor2X>
   152→  </PropertyGroup>
   153→
   154→  <!--
   155→    These are the targets that actually do compilation using CSC, separated from the main file for ease of maintenance.
   156→
   157→    RazorCoreCompile and any other targets that are needed for two-step compilation should be defined there.
   158→  -->
   159→  <Import Project="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Compilation.targets" Condition="'$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' != 'true'"/>
   160→
   161→  <!--
   162→    Razor defines two primary targets:
   163→      'RazorGenerate' - which updates generated code
   164→      'RazorCompile' - compiles an assembly from generated code
   165→
   166→    Use these properties and targets to attach behavior to the corresponding phase.
   167→  -->
   168→  <PropertyGroup>
   169→    <PrepareForRazorGenerateDependsOn>
   170→      ResolveRazorConfiguration;
   171→      ResolveRazorGenerateInputs;
   172→      AssignRazorGenerateTargetPaths;
   173→      _ResolveGeneratedRazorCompileInputs;
   174→      _CheckForIncorrectMvcConfiguration;
   175→    </PrepareForRazorGenerateDependsOn>
   176→
   177→    <PrepareForRazorGenerateDependsOn Condition="'$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' != 'true'">
   178→      $(PrepareForRazorGenerateDependsOn);
   179→      ResolveAssemblyReferenceRazorGenerateInputs;
   180→      _CheckForMissingRazorCompiler;
   181→      ResolveTagHelperRazorGenerateInputs
   182→    </PrepareForRazorGenerateDependsOn>
   183→
   184→    <PrepareForRazorComponentGenerateDependsOn>
   185→      ResolveRazorConfiguration;
   186→      ResolveRazorComponentInputs;
   187→      _CheckForIncorrectComponentsConfiguration;
   188→      AssignRazorComponentTargetPaths;
   189    </PrepareForRazorComponentGenerateDependsOn>
   190→
   191→    <RazorGenerateDependsOn>
   192→      PrepareForRazorGenerate;
   193→    </RazorGenerateDependsOn>
   194→
   195→    <RazorGenerateDependsOn Condition="'$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' != 'true'">
   196→      $(RazorGenerateDependsOn);
   197→      _CheckForMissingRazorCompiler;
   198→      RazorCoreGenerate
   199→    </RazorGenerateDependsOn>
   200→
   201→    <RazorComponentGenerateDependsOn>
   202→      PrepareForRazorComponentGenerate
   203→    </RazorComponentGenerateDependsOn>
   204→
   205→    <PrepareForRazorCompileDependsOn>
   206→      RazorGenerate;
   207→      ResolveRazorCompileInputs;
   208→      GenerateRazorTargetAssemblyInfo
   209→    </PrepareForRazorCompileDependsOn>
   210→
   211→    <ResolveRazorCompileInputsDependsOn>
   212→      ResolveRazorEmbeddedResources;
   213→    </ResolveRazorCompileInputsDependsOn>
   214→
   215→    <ResolveScopedCssOutputsDependsOn>
   216→      $(ResolveScopedCssOutputsDependsOn);
   217→      ResolveCssScopes;
   218→    </ResolveScopedCssOutputsDependsOn>
   219→
   220→    <DebugSymbolsProjectOutputGroupDependsOn>
   221→      $(DebugSymbolsProjectOutputGroupDependsOn);
   222→      _RazorAddDebugSymbolsProjectOutputGroupOutput
   223→    </DebugSymbolsProjectOutputGroupDependsOn>
   224→
   225→    <PrepareForBuildDependsOn>
   226→      $(PrepareForBuildDependsOn);
   227→      ResolveRazorGenerateInputs
   228→    </PrepareForBuildDependsOn>
   229→
   230→    <GenerateNuspecDependsOn>
   231→      ResolveRazorGenerateInputs;
   232→      $(GenerateNuspecDependsOn)
   233→    </GenerateNuspecDependsOn>
   234→
   235→    <PrepareForRunDependsOn>
   236→      _RazorPrepareForRun;
   237→      $(PrepareForRunDependsOn)
   238→    </PrepareForRunDependsOn>
   239→
   240→    <_RazorGenerateComponentDesignTimeDependsOn>
   241→      ResolveRazorComponentInputs;
   242→      AssignRazorComponentTargetPaths
   243→    </_RazorGenerateComponentDesignTimeDependsOn>
   244→  </PropertyGroup>
   245→
   246→  <!--
   247→    Default values for properties that affect Razor targets to the standard build lifecycle.
   248→  -->
   249→  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(RazorCompileOnBuild)'=='' AND '$(Language)'=='C#'">
   250→    <RazorCompileOnBuild>true</RazorCompileOnBuild>
   251→  </PropertyGroup>
   252→
   253→  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(RazorCompileOnPublish)'=='' AND '$(Language)'=='C#'">
   254→    <!-- Always compile on publish by default if we're compiling on build -->
   255→    <RazorCompileOnPublish Condition="'$(RazorCompileOnBuild)'=='true'">true</RazorCompileOnPublish>
   256→
   257→    <!-- Compatibility with the old MVC Precompilation setting -->
   258→    <RazorCompileOnPublish Condition="'$(RazorCompileOnPublish)'==''">$(MvcRazorCompileOnPublish)</RazorCompileOnPublish>
   259→
   260→    <!-- Default to on if MvcRazorCompileOnPublish isn't set for some reason -->
   261→    <RazorCompileOnPublish Condition="'$(RazorCompileOnPublish)'==''">true</RazorCompileOnPublish>
   262→  </PropertyGroup>
   263→
   264→  <!--
   265→    Properties that configure Razor SDK, but need to be defined in targets due to evaluation order.
   266→  -->
   267→  <PropertyGroup>
   268→    <!-- Output directory used for generated files -->
   269→    <RazorGenerateIntermediateOutputPath Condition="'$(RazorGenerateIntermediateOutputPath)'==''">$(IntermediateOutputPath)Razor\</RazorGenerateIntermediateOutputPath>
   270→
   271→    <_RazorComponentDeclarationOutputPath Condition="'$(_RazorComponentDeclarationOutputPath)'==''">$(IntermediateOutputPath)RazorDeclaration\</_RazorComponentDeclarationOutputPath>
   272→
   273→    <!--
   274→      Use the suffix .Views when producing compiled view assemblies. This matches the requirements for Mvc's ViewsFeatureProvider.
   275→    -->
   276→    <RazorTargetNameSuffix Condition="'$(RazorTargetNameSuffix)'=='' AND '$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true'">.Views</RazorTargetNameSuffix>
   277→
   278→    <!-- Suffix appended to $(TargetName) to produce $(RazorTargetName), the name of the assembly produced by Razor -->
   279→    <RazorTargetNameSuffix Condition="'$(RazorTargetNameSuffix)' == ''">.Razor</RazorTargetNameSuffix>
   280→
   281→    <!-- File name (without extension) of the assembly produced by Razor -->
   282→    <RazorTargetName Condition="'$(RazorTargetName)'==''">$(TargetName)$(RazorTargetNameSuffix)</RazorTargetName>
   283→
   284→    <!--
   285→      The compatibility zone - these properties were provided by the MVC Precompilation tool and they
   286→      map to supported settings in Razor SDK.
   287→
   288→      We want to set the defaults for these in the .props file, but we need to process the old settings here
   289→      in case they were set in the project file. The consequence of this is that the old settings will override
   290→      the new ones if they are set to conflicting values.
   291→    -->
   292→    <CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory Condition="'$(MvcRazorExcludeViewFilesFromPublish)'=='true'">false</CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory>
   293→    <CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory Condition="'$(MvcRazorExcludeViewFilesFromPublish)'=='false'">true</CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory>
   294→
   295→    <CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory Condition="'$(MvcRazorExcludeRefAssembliesFromPublish)'=='true'">false</CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory>
   296→    <CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory Condition="'$(MvcRazorExcludeRefAssembliesFromPublish)'=='false'">true</CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory>
   297→
   298→    <!-- Use PreserveCompilationReferences to determine the behavior of CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory if not explicitly specified by the project. -->
   299→    <CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory Condition="'$(CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory)'==''">$(PreserveCompilationReferences)</CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory>
   300→
   301→    <!-- For 2.x projects desktop and .NET Core projects, if they're opting in to runtime compilation (indicated by PreserveCompilationContext=true), set PreserveCompilationReferences = true -->
   302→    <PreserveCompilationReferences Condition=" '$(PreserveCompilationContext)' == 'true' AND
   303→      ('$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETFramework' OR
   304→       ('$(TargetFrameworkIdentifier)' == '.NETCoreApp' AND
   305→        '$(_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater)' != 'true')) ">true</PreserveCompilationReferences>
   306→
   307→    <!--
   308→      We can't set the actual default value here due to evaluation order (depends on $(OutDir)).
   309→
   310→      This handles a compatibility case with MVC Precompilation.
   311→    -->
   312→    <RazorOutputPath Condition="'$(MvcRazorOutputPath)'!=''">$([MSBuild]::EnsureTrailingSlash('$(MvcRazorOutputPath)'))</RazorOutputPath>
   313→
   314→    <!--
   315→      Configures whether all of the @(RazorGenerate) items will be added as embedded files to the produced assembly.
   316→
   317→      When true, everything in @(RazorGenerate) will be added to @(RazorEmbeddedFiles) and passed to CSC.
   318→    -->
   319→    <EmbedRazorGenerateSources Condition="'$(MvcRazorEmbedViewSources)'!=''">$(MvcRazorEmbedViewSources)</EmbedRazorGenerateSources>
   320→    <EmbedRazorGenerateSources Condition="'$(EmbedRazorGenerateSources)'==''">false</EmbedRazorGenerateSources>
   321→
   322→    <!--
   323→    Set to false to disable Razor code generation from using a persistent build server process.
   324→    -->
   325→    <UseRazorBuildServer Condition="'$(UseRazorBuildServer)'==''">$(UseSharedCompilation)</UseRazorBuildServer>
   326→    <UseRazorBuildServer Condition="'$(UseRazorBuildServer)'==''">true</UseRazorBuildServer>
   327→  </PropertyGroup>
   328→
   329→  <PropertyGroup>
   330→    <!-- Similar to https://github.com/Microsoft/msbuild/blob/908cc9ccd4961441628f68e37a148183a87bb067/src/Tasks/Microsoft.Common.CurrentVersion.targets#L146-L153 -->
   331→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>false</_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>
   332→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced Condition="'$(DebugSymbols)'=='true'">true</_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>
   333→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced Condition="'$(DebugType)'=='none'">false</_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>
   334→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced Condition="'$(DebugType)'=='pdbonly'">true</_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>
   335→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced Condition="'$(DebugType)'=='full'">true</_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>
   336→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced Condition="'$(DebugType)'=='portable'">true</_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>
   337→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced Condition="'$(DebugType)'=='embedded'">false</_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced>
   338→  </PropertyGroup>
   339→
   340→  <!--
   341→    Resolve the toolset to use. This specifically applies to compilation with 2.x projects where compilation could be performed either using
   342→    the PrecompilationTool (Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Razor.ViewCompilation) or the RazorSDK and we have to infer the tool that is to be used.
   343→    In 3.0 or later, there is only the RazorSdk.
   344→   -->
   345→  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true'">
   346→    <ResolvedRazorCompileToolset>RazorSdk</ResolvedRazorCompileToolset>
   347→  </PropertyGroup>
   348→
   349→  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)' == ''">
   350→    <!-- Default value for the property 'MvcRazorCompileOnPublish' is empty. If it has been explicitly enabled, continue using precompilation. -->
   351→    <ResolvedRazorCompileToolset Condition="'$(MvcRazorCompileOnPublish)' == 'true'">PrecompilationTool</ResolvedRazorCompileToolset>
   352→
   353→    <!-- The default value for 'RazorCompileToolset' was not modified. In this case, infer the toolset to use as RazorSdk. -->
   354→    <ResolvedRazorCompileToolset Condition="'$(MvcRazorCompileOnPublish)' == '' AND '$(RazorCompileToolset)' == 'Implicit'">RazorSdk</ResolvedRazorCompileToolset>
   355→
   356→    <ResolvedRazorCompileToolset Condition="'$(MvcRazorCompileOnPublish)' == '' AND '$(RazorCompileToolset)' == 'PrecompilationTool'">$(RazorCompileToolset)</ResolvedRazorCompileToolset>
   357→    <ResolvedRazorCompileToolset Condition="'$(MvcRazorCompileOnPublish)' == '' AND '$(RazorCompileToolset)' == 'RazorSdk'">$(RazorCompileToolset)</ResolvedRazorCompileToolset>
   358→
   359→    <!-- If RazorSdk is not referenced, fall-back to Precompilation tool when referenced by a 2.2 or earlier targeting project. -->
   360→    <ResolvedRazorCompileToolset Condition="'$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)' == 'RazorSdk' And '$(IsRazorCompilerReferenced)' != 'true'">PrecompilationTool</ResolvedRazorCompileToolset>
   361→
   362→    <!-- Previous versions of the precompilation tool still depends on the msbuild property 'MvcRazorCompileOnPublish'. Hence, setting it to the old default value -->
   363→    <MvcRazorCompileOnPublish Condition="'$(MvcRazorCompileOnPublish)' == ''">true</MvcRazorCompileOnPublish>
   364→  </PropertyGroup>
   365→
   366→  <!-- Back-compat for PrecompilationTool -->
   367→  <PropertyGroup>
   368→    <!--
   369→      For 2.x desktop targeting projects using MvcPrecompilation, ref assemblies are required to compile the PrecompiledViews.dll,
   370→      but are removed by the tool once done. Set PreserveCompilationReferences = true, ignoring any value configured in the project,
   371→      if the project is using the precompilation tool.
   372→    -->
   373→    <PreserveCompilationReferences Condition="'$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)'=='PrecompilationTool'">true</PreserveCompilationReferences>
   374→  </PropertyGroup>
   375→
   376→  <!--
   377→    Properties that configure Razor SDK, but need to be defined in targets due to evaluation order.
   378→  -->
   379→  <ItemGroup>
   380→    <!-- Used to creating the final compiled Razor dll -->
   381→    <RazorIntermediateAssembly Condition="'$(RazorIntermediateAssembly)'==''" Include="$(IntermediateOutputPath)$(RazorTargetName).dll" />
   382→    <!-- Used in Compilation.targets -->
   383→    <_RazorDebugSymbolsIntermediatePath Condition="'$(_RazorDebugSymbolsProduced)'=='true'" Include="$(IntermediateOutputPath)$(RazorTargetName).pdb" />
   384→  </ItemGroup>
   385→
   386→  <ItemGroup>
   387→    <!--
   388→      Add all .razor files to UpToDateCheckInput. Component compilation is not controlled by RazorCompileOnBuild,
   389→      which is why this itemgroup is unconditional.
   390→    -->
   391→    <UpToDateCheckInput Include="@(Content->WithMetadataValue('Extension', '.razor'))" />
   392→  </ItemGroup>
   393→
   394→  <!-- For apps building with the source generator, a separate Views assembly is produced out of the source
   395→  CSHTML files. In that scenario, the source CSHTML files and the output assembly
   396→  are treated in a separate set. -->
   397→  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' != 'true'">
   398→    <!--
   399→      Add all cshtml files to UpToDateCheckInput - a collection of files used by FastUpToDateCheck to determine
   400→      if any of the the project inputs have changed.
   401→    -->
   402→    <UpToDateCheckInput Condition="'$(RazorCompileOnBuild)'=='true'" Include="@(Content->WithMetadataValue('Extension', '.cshtml'))" Set="RazorViews" />
   403→    <!--
   404→      Add Razor output files to UpToDateCheckBuilt - a collection of files used by FastUpToDateCheck to determine
   405→      if any of the project's outputs have changed.
   406→    -->
   407→    <UpToDateCheckBuilt Include="@(RazorIntermediateAssembly)"
   408→      Condition="'$(RazorCompileOnBuild)'=='true' AND '@(Content->WithMetadataValue('Extension', '.cshtml'))' != ''" Set="RazorViews" />
   409→  </ItemGroup>
   410→
   411→  <!-- For apps building with the source generator, add .cshtml files to the default set since they are compiled into the app binary. -->
   412→  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' == 'true'">
   413→    <UpToDateCheckInput Include="@(Content->WithMetadataValue('Extension', '.cshtml'))" />
   414→  </ItemGroup>
   415→
   416→  <!--
   417→    These are the targets that generate code using Razor, separated from the main file for ease of maintenance.
   418→    Most targets related to Razor code generation are defined there.
   419→  -->
   420→
   421→  <!-- Determine what compiler and versions of the language to target. For 2.x targeting projects, these are carried by packages referenced by the project. Use this -->
   422→
   423→  <!-- When targeting 3.x and later projects, we have to infer configuration by inspecting the project. -->
   424→  <Import Project="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Configuration.targets" Condition="'$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true'" />
   425→
   426→  <Import Project="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.CodeGeneration.targets" />
   427→
   428→  <Import Project="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.Component.targets" Condition="'$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true' AND '$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' != 'true'" />
   429→
   430→  <Import Project="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.SourceGenerators.targets" Condition="'$(UseRazorSourceGenerator)' == 'true'" />
   431→
   432→  <Import Project="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.GenerateAssemblyInfo.targets" />
   433→
   434→  <Import Project="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.MvcApplicationPartsDiscovery.targets" Condition="'$(_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater)' == 'true'" />
   435→
   436→  <Target Name="PrepareForRazorGenerate" DependsOnTargets="$(PrepareForRazorGenerateDependsOn)">
   437→  </Target>
   438→
   439→  <Target Name="PrepareForRazorComponentGenerate" DependsOnTargets="$(PrepareForRazorComponentGenerateDependsOn)">
   440→  </Target>
   441→
   442→  <Target Name="RazorGenerate" DependsOnTargets="$(RazorGenerateDependsOn)">
   443→  </Target>
   444→
   445→  <Target Name="RazorComponentGenerate" DependsOnTargets="$(RazorComponentGenerateDependsOn)">
   446→  </Target>
   447→
   448→  <Target Name="PrepareForRazorCompile" DependsOnTargets="$(PrepareForRazorCompileDependsOn)">
   449→  </Target>
   450→
   451→  <Target Name="RazorCompile" DependsOnTargets="$(RazorCompileDependsOn)" Condition="'$(_UseSourceGenerators)' == ''">
   452→  </Target>
   453→
   454→  <!--
   455→    Computes the applicable @(ResolvedRazorConfiguration) and @(ResolvedRazorExtension) items that match the project's
   456→    configuration.
   457→  -->
   458→  <Target Name="ResolveRazorConfiguration">
   459→    <ItemGroup Condition="'$(RazorDefaultConfiguration)'!=''">
   460→      <ResolvedRazorConfiguration Include="@(RazorConfiguration->WithMetadataValue('Identity', '$(RazorDefaultConfiguration)')->Distinct())" />
   461→    </ItemGroup>
   462→
   463→    <!--
   464→      ResolvedRazorConfiguration should only ever have one item in it. If misconfigured, we may resolve more than one item which
   465→      may result in incorrect results or poorly worded build errors.
   466→    -->
   467→    <Warning Text="Unable to resolve a Razor configuration for the value '$(RazorDefaultConfiguration)'. Available configurations '@(RazorConfiguration->'%(Identity)', ', ')'.'"
   468→      Code="RAZORSDK1000"
   469→      Condition="'$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true' AND '@(ResolvedRazorConfiguration->Count())' == '0'" />
   470→
   471→    <Warning Text="More than one Razor configuration was resolved for the value '$(RazorDefaultConfiguration)'. Available configurations '@(RazorConfiguration->'%(Identity)', ', ')'."
   472→      Code="RAZORSDK1001"
   473→      Condition="'$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true' AND '@(ResolvedRazorConfiguration->Count())' > '1'" />
   474→
   475→    <!-- For a 3.0 project, targeting a RazorLangVersion is nearly always an error condition -->
   476→    <Warning Text="Detected Razor language version downgrade. This is typically caused by a reference to the Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Design package. Consider removing this package reference."
   477→      Code="RAZORSDK1006"
   478→      Condition="'$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' != 'true' AND '$(_TargetingNETCoreApp30OrLater)' == 'true'" />
   479→
   480→    <FindInList
   481→        List="@(RazorExtension)"
   482→        ItemSpecToFind="@(ResolvedRazorConfiguration->Metadata('Extensions'))"
   483→        Condition="'@(ResolvedRazorConfiguration->HasMetadata('Extensions')->Count())' != '0'">
   484→      <Output TaskParameter="ItemFound" ItemName="ResolvedRazorExtension" />
   485→    </FindInList>
   486→  </Target>
   487→
   488→  <!--
   489→    Gets assembly attributes in support for Razor runtime code generation. This is a set of standard
   490→    metadata attributes (defined in Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Runtime) that capture the build-time
   491→    Razor configuration of an application to be used at runtime.
   492→
   493→    This allows the project file to act as the source of truth for the applicable Razor configuration regardless
   494→    of how Razor is used.
   495→
   496→    The SDK expects configurations that use runtime compilation to set $(GenerateRazorHostingAssemblyInfo) to true,
   497→    it will be unset by default.
   498→  -->
   499→
   500→  <Target
   501→    Name="RazorGetAssemblyAttributes"
   502→    Condition="'$(GenerateRazorHostingAssemblyInfo)'=='true' and '$(RazorDefaultConfiguration)'!=''"
   503→    DependsOnTargets="ResolveRazorConfiguration">
   504→    <ItemGroup>
   505→      <_RazorAssemblyAttribute Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Hosting.RazorLanguageVersionAttribute">
   506→        <_Parameter1>$(RazorLangVersion)</_Parameter1>
   507→      </_RazorAssemblyAttribute>
   508→      <_RazorAssemblyAttribute Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Hosting.RazorConfigurationNameAttribute">
   509→        <_Parameter1>$(RazorDefaultConfiguration)</_Parameter1>
   510→      </_RazorAssemblyAttribute>
   511→      <_RazorAssemblyAttribute Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Hosting.RazorExtensionAssemblyNameAttribute" Condition="'%(ResolvedRazorExtension.AssemblyName)'!=''">
   512→        <_Parameter1>%(ResolvedRazorExtension.Identity)</_Parameter1>
   513→        <_Parameter2>%(ResolvedRazorExtension.AssemblyName)</_Parameter2>
   514→      </_RazorAssemblyAttribute>
   515→    </ItemGroup>
   516→
   517→  </Target>
   518→
   519→  <!--
   520→    Gathers input source files for code generation. This is a separate target so that we can avoid
   521→    lots of work when there are no inputs for code generation.
   522→    This target runs as part of PrepareForBuild. This gives us an opportunitity to change things like CopyToPublishDirectory
   523→    for Content items before they are processed by other Build targets.
   524→
   525→    NOTE: This target is called as part of an incremental build scenario in VS. Do not perform any work
   526→    outside of calculating RazorGenerate items in this target.
   527→  -->
   528→  <Target Name="ResolveRazorGenerateInputs">
   529→    <!--
   530→      In MVC Precompilation MvcRazorFilesToCompile also had the effect of suppressing the default
   531→      items for Razor code generation. As with all of these MVC Precompilation back-compat settings,
   532→      using the old thing, overrides the new thing.
   533→    -->
   534→    <PropertyGroup Condition="'@(MvcRazorFilesToCompile)'!=''">
   535→      <EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems>false</EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems>
   536→    </PropertyGroup>
   537→    <ItemGroup>
   538→      <RazorGenerate Include="@(MvcRazorFilesToCompile)" />
   539→    </ItemGroup>
   540→
   541→    <ItemGroup Condition="'$(EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems)'=='true'">
   542→      <RazorGenerate
   543→        Include="@(Content)"
   544→        Exclude="$(_RazorComponentInclude)"
   545→        Condition="'%(Content.Extension)'=='.cshtml'" />
   546→    </ItemGroup>
   547→
   548→    <!--
   549→      Ideally we want to able to update all Content items that also appear in RazorGenerate to have
   550→      CopyToPublishDirectory=Never. However, there isn't a simple way to do this (https://github.com/Microsoft/msbuild/issues/1618).
   551→      Instead, we'll update all cshtml Content items when EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems=true and Razor Sdk is used for publishing.
   552→    -->
   553→    <ItemGroup Condition="
   554→      '$(EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems)'=='true' and
   555→      '$(CopyRazorGenerateFilesToPublishDirectory)'=='false' and
   556→      '$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)'=='RazorSdk' and
   557→      '$(RazorCompileOnPublish)'=='true'">
   558→
   559→      <Content Condition="'%(Content.Extension)'=='.cshtml'" CopyToPublishDirectory="Never" />
   560→    </ItemGroup>
   561→
   562→    <ItemGroup Condition="
   563→      '$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)'=='RazorSdk' and
   564→      '$(EnableDefaultRazorGenerateItems)'=='true'">
   565→
   566→      <Content Condition="'%(Content.Extension)'=='.cshtml'" Pack="$(IncludeRazorContentInPack)" />
   567→      <Content Condition="'%(Content.Extension)'=='.razor'" Pack="$(IncludeRazorContentInPack)" />
   568→    </ItemGroup>
   569→  </Target>
   570→
   571→  <Target Name="ResolveRazorComponentInputs">
   572→    <!--
   573→    Gathers input source files for Razor component generation. This is a separate target so that we can avoid
   574→    lots of work when there are no inputs for code generation.
   575→
   576→    NOTE: This target is called as part of an incremental build scenario in VS. Do not perform any work
   577→    outside of calculating RazorComponent items in this target.
   578→    -->
   579→
   580→    <ItemGroup Condition="'$(EnableDefaultRazorComponentItems)'=='true'">
   581→      <RazorComponent Include="@(Content)" Condition="'%(Content.Extension)'=='.razor'" />
   582→      <RazorComponent Include="$(_RazorComponentInclude)" />
   583→    </ItemGroup>
   584→
   585→    <ItemGroup>
   586→      <Content Condition="'%(Content.Extension)'=='.razor'" CopyToPublishDirectory="Never" />
   587→    </ItemGroup>
   588→  </Target>
   589→
   590→  <!-- This target validates that there is at most one scoped css file per component, that there are no scoped css files without a
   591→     matching component, and then adds the associated scope to the razor components that have a matching scoped css file.
   592→  -->
   593→  <Target
   594→    Name="ResolveCssScopes"
   595→    Condition="'$(ScopedCssEnabled)' == 'true'"
   596→    BeforeTargets="AssignRazorComponentTargetPaths;AssignRazorGenerateTargetPaths"
   597→    DependsOnTargets="ComputeCssScope;ResolveRazorComponentInputs;ResolveRazorGenerateInputs">
   598→    <ApplyCssScopes RazorComponents="@(RazorComponent)" RazorGenerate="@(RazorGenerate)" ScopedCss="@(_ScopedCss)">
   599→      <Output TaskParameter="RazorComponentsWithScopes" ItemName="_RazorComponentsWithScopes" />
   600→      <Output TaskParameter="RazorGenerateWithScopes" ItemName="_RazorGenerateWithScopes" />
   601→    </ApplyCssScopes>
   602→    <ItemGroup>
   603→      <RazorComponent Remove="@(_RazorComponentsWithScopes)" />
   604→      <RazorComponent Include="@(_RazorComponentsWithScopes)" />
   605→      <RazorGenerate Remove="@(_RazorGenerateWithScopes)" />
   606→      <RazorGenerate Include="@(_RazorGenerateWithScopes)" />
   607→    </ItemGroup>
   608→  </Target>
   609→
   610→  <!--
   611→    Temporarary workaround for https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/issues/6859. This can be removed after a VS insertion with a newer copy of the DesignTime targets.
   612→  -->
   613→  <ItemGroup>
   614→    <Content Update="$(_RazorComponentInclude)">
   615→      <Generator>MSBuild:RazorGenerateComponentDeclarationDesignTime</Generator>
   616→      <CopyToPublishDirectory>Never</CopyToPublishDirectory>
   617→    </Content>
   618→  </ItemGroup>
   619→
   620→  <Target Name="AssignRazorComponentTargetPaths" Condition="'@(RazorComponent)' != ''">
   621→    <AssignTargetPath Files="@(RazorComponent)" RootFolder="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)">
   622→      <Output TaskParameter="AssignedFiles" ItemName="RazorComponentWithTargetPath" />
   623→    </AssignTargetPath>
   624→
   625→    <ItemGroup>
   626→      <RazorComponentWithTargetPath Condition="'%(RazorComponentWithTargetPath.GeneratedOutput)' == ''">
   627→        <GeneratedOutput>$(RazorGenerateIntermediateOutputPath)%(RazorComponentWithTargetPath.TargetPath)$(RazorGenerateOutputFileExtension)</GeneratedOutput>
   628→      </RazorComponentWithTargetPath>
   629→
   630→      <RazorComponentWithTargetPath Condition="'%(RazorComponentWithTargetPath.GeneratedDeclaration)' == ''">
   631→        <GeneratedDeclaration>$(_RazorComponentDeclarationOutputPath)%(RazorComponentWithTargetPath.TargetPath)$(RazorGenerateOutputFileExtension)</GeneratedDeclaration>
   632→      </RazorComponentWithTargetPath>
   633→
   634→      <RazorComponentWithTargetPath Condition="'%(RazorComponentWithTargetPath.DocumentKind)' == ''">
   635→        <DocumentKind>component</DocumentKind>
   636→      </RazorComponentWithTargetPath>
   637→    </ItemGroup>
   638→  </Target>
   639→
   640→  <Target Name="AssignRazorGenerateTargetPaths" Condition="'@(RazorGenerate)' != ''">
   641→    <AssignTargetPath Files="@(RazorGenerate)" RootFolder="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)">
   642→      <Output TaskParameter="AssignedFiles" ItemName="RazorGenerateWithTargetPath" />
   643→    </AssignTargetPath>
   644→
   645→    <ItemGroup>
   646→      <RazorGenerateWithTargetPath Condition="'%(RazorGenerateWithTargetPath.GeneratedOutput)' == ''">
   647→        <GeneratedOutput>$(RazorGenerateIntermediateOutputPath)%(RazorGenerateWithTargetPath.TargetPath)$(RazorGenerateOutputFileExtension)</GeneratedOutput>
   648→      </RazorGenerateWithTargetPath>
   649→
   650→      <RazorGenerateWithTargetPath Condition="'%(RazorGenerateWithTargetPath.DocumentKind)' == ''">
   651→        <DocumentKind>mvc</DocumentKind>
   652→      </RazorGenerateWithTargetPath>
   653→    </ItemGroup>
   654→  </Target>
   655→
   656→  <!--
   657→    Gathers input assemblies for Tag Helper discovery and compilation. Add items to @(ReferencePath)
   658→  -->
   659→  <Target
   660→    Name="ResolveAssemblyReferenceRazorGenerateInputs"
   661→    DependsOnTargets="ResolveReferences">
   662→
   663→    <ItemGroup>
   664→      <RazorReferencePath Include="@(ReferencePath)"/>
   665→
   666→      <!--
   667→      RazorReferencePath must include the closure of assemblies required for tag helper discovery to keep parity with the 2.1 Razor.Design package.
   668→      Use the component declaration assembly, if available or the IntermediateAssembly if no components are involved in the build.
   669→      -->
   670→      <RazorReferencePath
   671→        Include="$(_RazorComponentDeclarationAssemblyFullPath)"
   672→        Condition="'$(_RazorComponentDeclarationAssemblyFullPath)' != ''" />
   673→
   674→      <RazorReferencePath
   675→        Include="@(IntermediateAssembly->Metadata('FullPath'))"
   676→        Condition="'$(_RazorComponentDeclarationAssemblyFullPath)' == ''" />
   677→    </ItemGroup>
   678→  </Target>
   679→
   680→  <!--
   681→    Gathers inputs to the RazorCoreCompile target into the @(RazorCompile) itemgroup.
   682→
   683→    This is marker target so that the code generation targets can attach.
   684→  -->
   685→  <Target Name="ResolveRazorCompileInputs" DependsOnTargets="$(ResolveRazorCompileInputsDependsOn)">
   686→  </Target>
   687→
   688→  <Target Name="ResolveRazorEmbeddedResources" Condition="'$(EmbedRazorGenerateSources)'=='true'">
   689→    <ItemGroup>
   690→      <RazorEmbeddedResource Include="@(RazorGenerateWithTargetPath)">
   691→        <LogicalName>/$([System.String]::Copy('%(RazorGenerateWithTargetPath.TargetPath)').Replace('\','/'))</LogicalName>
   692→        <Type>Non-Resx</Type>
   693→        <WithCulture>false</WithCulture>
   694→      </RazorEmbeddedResource>
   695→
   696→      <!-- Similar to _GenerateCompileInputs -->
   697→      <_RazorCoreCompileResourceInputs
   698→        Include="@(RazorEmbeddedResource)"
   699→        Condition="'%(RazorEmbeddedResource.WithCulture)'=='false' and '%(RazorEmbeddedResource.Type)'=='Non-Resx' " />
   700→    </ItemGroup>
   701→  </Target>
   702→
   703→  <!--
   704→    This target is called after PrepareForPublish when RazorCompileOnPublish=true so that we can hook into publish.
   705→    This target just hooks up other targets since Publish and PrepareForPublish don't have a DependsOnTargets
   706→    property we can use.
   707→  -->
   708→  <Target
   709→    Name="_RazorPrepareForPublish"
   710→    AfterTargets="PrepareForPublish"
   711→    DependsOnTargets="RazorCompile"
   712→    Condition="'$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)'=='RazorSdk' and '$(RazorCompileOnPublish)'=='true' and '$(NoBuild)'!='true'">
   713→  </Target>
   714→
   715→  <Target
   716→    Name="_RazorAddDebugSymbolsProjectOutputGroupOutput"
   717→    DependsOnTargets="_ResolveRazorTargetPath;ResolveRazorGenerateInputs"
   718→    Condition="'$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)'=='RazorSdk' and '$(RazorCompileOnBuild)'=='true'">
   719→
   720→    <ItemGroup Condition="Exists('@(_RazorDebugSymbolsIntermediatePath)')">
   721→      <DebugSymbolsProjectOutputGroupOutput Include="%(_RazorDebugSymbolsIntermediatePath.FullPath)" FinalOutputPath="$(RazorTargetDir)$(RazorTargetName).pdb" />
   722→    </ItemGroup>
   723→
   724→  </Target>
   725→
   726→  <!--
   727→    Set up RazorCompile to run before PrepareForRun. This should ensure that the Razor dll and pdbs are available to be copied
   728→    as part of GetCopyToOutputDirectoryItems which is invoked during PrepareForRun.
   729→  -->
   730→  <Target
   731→    Name="_RazorPrepareForRun"
   732→    DependsOnTargets="RazorCompile"
   733→    Condition="'$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)'=='RazorSdk' and '$(RazorCompileOnBuild)'=='true'" />
   734→
   735→  <Target
   736→    Name="_RazorRemoveRefAssembliesFromPublish"
   737→    BeforeTargets="PrepareForPublish"
   738→    Condition="'$(ResolvedRazorCompileToolset)'=='RazorSdk' and '$(RazorCompileOnPublish)'=='true' AND '$(CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory)' != ''">
   739→    <!--
   740→      Setting PreserveCompilationReferences affects both Build and Publish, but we want CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory to only affect publishing.
   741→      Use the value of CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory to determine PreserveCompilationReferences during publish.
   742→    -->
   743→    <PropertyGroup>
   744→      <PreserveCompilationReferences>$(CopyRefAssembliesToPublishDirectory)</PreserveCompilationReferences>
   745→    </PropertyGroup>
   746→  </Target>
   747→
   748→  <Target Name="_CheckForMissingRazorCompiler" Condition="'$(IsRazorCompilerReferenced)' != 'true'">
   749→    <Error
   750→      Code="RAZORSDK1003"
   751→      Text="A PackageReference for 'Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Design' was not included in your project. This package is required to compile Razor files. Typically, a
   752→ transitive reference to 'Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Design' and references required to compile Razor files are obtained by adding a PackageReference
   753→ for 'Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc' in your project. For more information, see https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=868374." />
   754→  </Target>
   755→
   756→  <Target Name="_CheckForIncorrectMvcConfiguration"
   757→    Condition="'@(ResolvedRazorConfiguration)' == 'Default' AND
   758→      ('$(RazorCompileOnBuild)' == 'true' OR '$(RazorCompileOnPublish)' =='true') AND
   759→      '@(RazorGenerate->Count())' != '0' AND
   760→      '$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true' AND
   761→      '$(_IsTargetingRazor2X)' != 'true'">
   762→    <Warning
   763→       Code="RAZORSDK1004"
   764→       Text="One or more Razor view or page files were found, but the project is not configured to add Razor support for MVC. The MSBuild property 'AddRazorSupportForMvc' must be set to correctly compile Razor files that target MVC. For more information, see https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=868374." />
   765→  </Target>
   766→
   767→  <Target Name="_CheckForIncorrectComponentsConfiguration"
   768→    Condition="('$(RazorCompileOnBuild)' == 'true' OR '$(RazorCompileOnPublish)' =='true') AND
   769→      '@(RazorComponent->Count())' != '0' AND
   770→      '$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' != 'true' AND
   771→      '$(_IsTargetingRazor2X)' != 'true'">
   772→
   773→    <Warning
   774→       Code="RAZORSDK1005"
   775→       Text="One or more Razor component files (.razor) were found, but the project is not configured to compile Razor Components. Configure the project by targeting RazorLangVersion 3.0 or newer. For more information, see https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=868374." />
   776→  </Target>
   777→
   778→  <Target Name="_ResolveRazorTargetPath">
   779→    <PropertyGroup>
   780→      <RazorOutputPath Condition="'$(RazorOutputPath)'==''">$([MSBuild]::EnsureTrailingSlash('$(OutDir)'))</RazorOutputPath>
   781→      <RazorTargetDir>$([MSBuild]::Escape($([MSBuild]::EnsureTrailingSlash($([System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath('$([System.IO.Path]::Combine('$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)', '$(RazorOutputPath)'))'))))))</RazorTargetDir>
   782→      <!-- Example, c:\MyProjects\MyProject\bin\debug\MyAssembly.Views.dll -->
   783→      <RazorTargetPath Condition=" '$(RazorTargetPath)' == '' ">$(RazorTargetDir)$(RazorTargetName).dll</RazorTargetPath>
   784→    </PropertyGroup>
   785→  </Target>
   786→
   787→  <Target Name="_ResolveGeneratedRazorCompileInputs">
   788→    <ItemGroup>
   789→      <RazorCompile
   790→        Include="%(RazorGenerateWithTargetPath.GeneratedOutput)"
   791→        Condition="'%(RazorGenerateWithTargetPath.DocumentKind)'=='mvc'" />
   792→    </ItemGroup>
   793→  </Target>
   794→
   795→  <Target Name="_RazorSdkCustomCollectWatchItems">
   796→    <ItemGroup>
   797→      <Watch Include="%(Content.FullPath)" Condition="'%(Content.Extension)' == '.razor' AND '%(Content.Watch)' != 'false'" />
   798→      <Watch Include="%(None.FullPath)" Condition="($([System.String]::Copy('%(None.FullPath)').EndsWith('.razor.css')) OR $([System.String]::Copy('%(None.FullPath)').EndsWith('.cshtml.css'))) AND '%(None.Watch)' != 'false'" />
   799→      <Watch Include="%(Content.FullPath)"
   800→        Condition="'$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true' AND '$(AddCshtmlFilesToDotNetWatchList)' != 'false' AND '%(Content.Extension)' == '.cshtml' AND '%(Content.Watch)' != 'false'" />
   801→    </ItemGroup>
   802→  </Target>
   803→
   804→  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(RazorDesignTimeTargets)'==''">
   805→    <RazorDesignTimeTargets>$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\Microsoft\VisualStudio\Razor\Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.DesignTime.targets</RazorDesignTimeTargets>
   806→    <RazorDesignTimeTargets Condition="!Exists('$(RazorDesignTimeTargets)')">$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor.DesignTime.targets</RazorDesignTimeTargets>
   807→  </PropertyGroup>
   808→
   809→  <Import Project="$(RazorDesignTimeTargets)" />
   810→
   811→  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(_RazorUpToDateReloadFileTypesAllowWorkaround)' != 'false'">
   812→    <!--
   813→      Defines the list of file extensions that VS will monitor to reload the application.
   814→      We'll only define these for C# projects targeting RazorLangVersion 3.0 or later, and let VS use defaults in other cases.
   815→
   816→      This property can be removed after the next insertion in to VS.
   817→    -->
   818→    <UpToDateReloadFileTypes Condition="'$(Language)'=='C#' AND '$(_Targeting30OrNewerRazorLangVersion)' == 'true' AND '$(UpToDateReloadFileTypes)' == ''">$(RazorUpToDateReloadFileTypes)</UpToDateReloadFileTypes>
   819→  </PropertyGroup>
   820→
   821→  <!--
   822→    This is a hook to import a set of targets after the Razor targets. By default this is unused.
   823→  -->
   824→  <Import Project="$(CustomAfterRazorSdkTargets)" Condition="'$(CustomAfterRazorSdkTargets)' != '' and Exists('$(CustomAfterRazorSdkTargets)')"/>
   825→
   826→</Project>
   827→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
